html:
Exclusive to:

Brilliant Mudslinger is an item that can be crafted only by Wurt with the "Terra Mutation" skill. It allows you to throw a swamp ball on a surface. After hitting the ground it creates a 7x7 Mutated Marsh Turf area. All Merms loyal to the player will mutate and become a Planar buffed Mutated Merm or Mutated Merm Guard (the buff is only temporary, but the Merms will always stay mutated). This turf replaces Sanity with Enlightenment, and Gestalts can appear on this turf.

The Brilliant Mudslinger costs 20 to cast and then goes on a 8 minutes cooldown. The mutated marsh turf stays for 2 minutes.

Unlike the common Marsh Turf, the mutated marsh turf can't be dug up, can't be used for planting, using the Garden Digamajig or building Wurt structures.

Hydrous Healing II

Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

Slippery Hide II

Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

Gallery

  • Old Brilliant Mudslinger Dropped texture
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“Looking at it makes my head feel funny.”
–Wilson
“Heh. Why adapt to the environment if the environment can adapt to you?”
–Willow
“It give Wolfgang strange brain feeling.”
–Wolfgang
“Sigh. Isn't the regular swamp bad enough?”
–Wendy
“UNIMPRESSED”
–WX-78
“Don't let the power go to your head, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“It makes me nervous.”
–Woodie
“Stop mucking about with that lunar filth!”
–Maxwell
“The small beastie seems keen tö expand her kingdöm.”
–Wigfrid
“Wurt won't let us play with her mud wand, even after we shared our snacks!”
–Webber
“There's something brewing in the mind of our little friend.”
–Warly
“Pretty!”
–Wormwood
“Wurt is tappin' into some weird stuff here.”
–Winona
“Don't be fooled by its shine so bright, what rains down is sure to fright.”
–Wortox
“Bright stick!”
–Wurt
“It must be some kind of swamp witchcraft!”
–Walter
“Ah, the "enlightened" merm kingdom timeline. We're doomed.”
–Wanda
Brilliant Mudslinger is an item that can be crafted only by Wurt with the "Terra Mutation" skill. It allows you to throw a swamp ball on a surface. After hitting the ground it creates a 7x7 Mutated Marsh Turf area. All Merms loyal to the player will mutate and become a Planar buffed Mutated Merm or Mutated Merm Guard (the buff is only temporary, but the Merms will always stay mutated). This turf replaces Sanity with Enlightenment, and Gestalts can appear on this turf.
The Brilliant Mudslinger costs 20 to cast and then goes on a 8 minutes cooldown. The mutated marsh turf stays for 2 minutes.
Unlike the common Marsh Turf, the mutated marsh turf can't be dug up, can't be used for planting, using the Garden Digamajig or building Wurt structures.

Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Brilliant Mudslinger là một vật phẩm chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Wurt với kỹ năng "Terra Mutation". Nó cho phép bạn ném một quả bóng đầm lầy trên một bề mặt. Sau khi chạm đất, nó tạo ra một khu vực Đất Đầm lầy Đột biến 7x7. Tất cả Người Cá trung thành với người chơi sẽ biến đổi và trở thành Người Cá Đột Biến hoặc Người Bảo Vệ Người Cá Đột Biến được buff bởi Planar (việc buff này chỉ là tạm thời, nhưng Người Cá sẽ luôn bị đột biến). Sân cỏ này thay thế Tinh Thần bằng Sự Khai Sáng và Gestalt có thể xuất hiện trên sân cỏ này.

Brilliant Mudslinger is an item that can be crafted only by [[Wurt]] with the "[[Terra Mutation]]" skill. It allows you to throw a swamp ball on a surface. After hitting the ground it creates a 7x7 Mutated Marsh Turf area. All [[Merms]] loyal to the player will mutate and become a Planar buffed [[Mutated Merm]] or [[Mutated Merm Guard]] (the buff is only temporary, but the Merms will always stay mutated). This turf replaces [[Sanity]] with [[Enlightenment]], and [[Gestalt]]s can appear on this turf.

The Brilliant Mudslinger costs 20 {{Sanity}} to cast and then goes on a 8 minutes cooldown. The mutated marsh turf stays for 2 minutes.

Unlike the common [[Marsh Turf]], the mutated marsh turf can't be dug up, can't be used for planting, using the [[Garden Digamajig]] or building [[Wurt]] structures.

=== {{picDark|32|Hydrous Healing II}} Hydrous Healing II ===
Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on [[Dreaded Mudslinger|Corrupted Marsh Turf]] or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

=== {{picDark|32|Slippery Hide II}} Slippery Hide II ===
Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on [[Dreaded Mudslinger|Corrupted Marsh Turf]] or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.
